Claude Code Statusline for OpenUsage

Display your Claude usage (Session, Weekly, Today) in Claude Code's status bar using the OpenUsage local API.

## Quick Install

```bash
curl -o ~/.claude/claude-usage-statusline.sh \
  https://gist.githubusercontent.com/YOUR_GIST_ID/raw/statusline.sh
chmod +x ~/.claude/claude-usage-statusline.sh
```

## Configure

Add to `~/.claude/settings.json` (see settings.json in this gist).

## Requirements

- OpenUsage app running (provides API at localhost:6736)
- curl, sed (preinstalled on macOS/Linux)
